ticker_reviews.text: Phil was fantastic — showed up on time, worked incredibly hard all day and the site was spotless when he left. Exactly what you want.
ticker_reviews.author: Airtasker Client · Brisbane

ticker_reviews.text: Hired Phil for a big garden cleanup — he moved more in a morning than I expected in a full day. Very tidy, very professional. Will definitely use again.
ticker_reviews.author: Airtasker Client · Ipswich

ticker_reviews.text: Second time using Phil and same as the first — reliable, strong, good value. He just gets on with it and does the job properly.
ticker_reviews.author: Repeat Client · Lockyer Valley
